title: helictotrichon pratense subsp. ibericum
intro: Helictotrichon pratense subsp. ibericum, also known as Iberian oat-grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Helictotrichon pratense subsp. ibericum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create a decoction or tincture.
